title: YapiFix
description: Fixes world generation crashes caused by Feature order cycles in modded biomes.
body: YapiFix — Universal Worldgen Crash Fix (Forge 1.20.1) YapiFix is a lightweight **compatibility patch mod** for Minecraft 1.20.1 modpacks. It is designed to prevent _Feature order cycle found_ / FeatureSorter worldgen crashes caused by inconsistent placed-feature ordering between biome and worldgen mods. What changed in 2.0.0 Earlier versions of YapiFix fixed a small number of known mod conflicts manually. Starting with **YapiFix 2.0.0**, the mod uses a broader universal stabilization approach: it normalizes feature ordering after biome modifiers have finished running, helping prevent feature order cycles even when the exact conflicting mod pair is unknown. What YapiFix does * Helps prevent FeatureSorter / feature order cycle crashes * Applies a deterministic feature order during world generation * Runs as a final compatibility pass after other biome modifiers * Keeps existing targeted fixes for known problematic cases * Works as an “install it and forget it” worldgen compatibility patch What YapiFix does not do * Does not remove biome features * Does not remove biomes * Does not disable worldgen mods * Does not fix unrelated crashes caused by broken datapack JSON, missing registry entries, invalid configured features, or other mods’ mixins Useful for modpacks with * Atmospheric * Biome Fest * Aromatic * Blueprint-based biome mods * Large modpacks with many biome/worldgen mods Works with * Existing worlds * New worlds * Datapacks * Large modpacks Target Minecraft Version * Forge **1.20.1** Notes YapiFix was created to fix real-world worldgen crashes in production modpacks. Version 2.0.0 changes the philosophy of the mod: instead of only patching individual known conflicts, YapiFix now aims to prevent this entire class of feature-order crashes automatically. Usage & Permissions All rights reserved. You may freely use this mod in private modpacks and personal projects. If used in public modpacks or servers, a mention or message is appreciated, but not required. Distribution Reuploads to other platforms are not permitted without explicit permission. Linking to the Modrinth page is always welcome. Updates & Support YapiFix is updated on request. If you encounter a FeatureSorter cycle or similar worldgen crash that is not fixed by this mod, you may report it and I will review it when possible. ## Community Follow the development of the mod, share ideas, and stay updated here: **YouTube:** [https://www.youtube.com/@YAPILabs](https://www.youtube.com/@YAPILabs) **Discord:** [https://discord.gg/KYGyy9jFCz](https://discord.gg/KYGyy9jFCz)
